items.name: MyFrancLucifer "Mademoiselle C" Flap
items.description:
FrancLucifer's Monsieur/Mademoiselle Flap was originally designed back in 2021, also the first *single mesh accessory at FrancLucifer.
This is a special limited variation of the Flap, putting a unique twist with creativity.

Made to fit all essentials and worn on the left shoulder.

*This item is a Front Accessory.
*Blocky Body Bags are made to be Back Accessories, while Woman Body Bags are Front.

Modelled by FrancLucifer
Textured by Mewiry

items.name: Rosie the Riveter Shoulder Bag 3.0
items.description:
Celebrate International Women's Day on March 8 with a Rosie the Riveter-themed shoulder bag, inspired by J. Howard Miller's iconic 'We Can Do It!' poster. This bag not only serves as a functional accessory but also as a symbol of women's rights, equality, and empowerment.

To ALL women and girls, "We Can Do It!!"

concept & made by https://www.roblox.com/users/1265917632/profile

Happy Women's Day!!
